title: `Adna' #5733
definition:
Adna = "rest" or "pleasure"

 1) one of the family of Pahath-moab who returned with Ezra and
    married a foreign wife
 2) a priest, descendant of Harim in the days of Joiakim, the son of
    Jeshua
nasbUsage:

 1) one of the family of Pahath-moab who returned with Ezra and
    married a foreign wife

    NASB:  two Isr.
